meta.name: PRSM RECOVERY: Unpause FTNSTokenSimple
meta.description: Resumes FTNS token transfers after pause. PRECONDITIONS for cosigning: (1) patched contract deployed via upgradeTo, (2) auditor sign-off on patch, (3) 24-hour Sepolia bake-in of patched version, (4) public unpause announcement queued for T+0 of execution. See EXPLOIT_RESPONSE_PLAYBOOK.md §4 (Recover phase).
